'''Northaykk''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Behind the scenes==
Northaykk was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel [[Tyrant's Test]].

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
